user.title: Setup Taoyuan Garbage Truck (1/3)
user.description: Please enter your full address. The system will automatically find nearby routes.

data.address: Your Full Address (e.g. 桃園市桃園區建華一街)

manual_location.title: Enter Coordinates Manually (1b/3)
manual_location.description: Address lookup failed. Please enter your home latitude and longitude (available from Google Maps).

route.title: Select Route (2/3)
route.description: The system has filtered routes for this district and pre-selected the most likely one. Please confirm or select the correct route.

poi.title: Select Specific Stop (3/3)
poi.description: The system has pre-selected the stop closest to your home (ETA will be based on this stop). You can manually select another stop.

error.address_not_found: Could not resolve the coordinates for this address. Please check if the address is correct.
error.routes_not_found: Could not find routes near this address. Please make sure the address includes the correct district name.
error.pois_not_found: Could not retrieve stop information for this route. Please try again later.
error.invalid_coordinates: Coordinates are outside Taiwan (lat 21–26, lng 119–123). Please re-enter.
